name: Brighto Stain Free
description: A low-VOC interior premium emulsion paint designed to repel stains like ketchup, tea, coffee, juice, ink, handprints.

name: Brighto Super Emulsion
description: Special emulsion for interior use — walls, ceilings, plaster, concrete, etc. Gives an 'ultra silky smooth' finish.

name: Brighto Plastic Emulsion
description: Interior emulsion for general-purpose use on walls, ceilings, plaster, concrete, etc.

name: Brighto All Weather
description: Exterior paint made to protect buildings from all weather. Can be used on exterior walls, ceilings, concrete, plaster.

name: Brighto Super Texture
description: A high-quality acrylic-based waterborne texture paint used to create different kinds of textural effects on both interior and exterior masonry surfaces.

name: Brighto Interior Primer
description: A water-based primer for interior walls, to prepare surfaces before painting.

name: Brighto Super Primer
description: A PVA-based primer. Good for sealing interior surfaces, reducing porosity, preparing for paint.

name: Brighto Red Oxide Primer
description: Primer for metal surfaces (or iron / steel) to protect from rust and improve paint bonding.

name: Brighto Exterior Primer
description: Water-based primer for exterior surfaces (walls, plaster, concrete) before applying exterior paint.
